title: Do you want to make Minecraft better?
description: This is an assembly from a variety of both optimizing mods and complementing the game. With this build, you can also play on servers.
body: In this mod pack, many different mods were collected both to optimize Minecraft and to improve the visual component of the game. For example, the textures of various types of armor and weapons were changed.  Mechanics have also been added that diversify various aspects of the game, for example, improving the sound component of the game. Now you can hear echoes in caves.
